lesson: A block is placed on top of another block. The lower block has mass m2 = 5.4 kg and rests on a frictionless table. A horizontal force of magnitude F = 24 N is applied to the lower block. The coefficient of static friction between the two blocks is mu_s = 0.28. What is the maximum value of m1, in kilograms, for which the two blocks move together without slipping? Take g = 9.8 m/s^2.
